reason: Feature threads metadata and force state through YouTube, core resolution, translation, cache, and UI boundaries.
New context normalization, constants, and range logic need single ownership rather than repeated parsing.
Defines the single-entry userscript module boundaries and placement of YouTube/translation/core responsibilities.
Retranslation must preserve Store cues, use abort correctly, and distinguish captured source fragments from rendered cues.
Owns fail-closed translation, soft-fail L2, Trusted Types, single-IIFE, and alignment invariants.
Owns menu/UI conventions and the rule against unnecessary persistent player controls.
